CustomField.formula: IF( ISBLANK(leaseworks__Aircraft__c), CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__World_Fleet_Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Aircraft_Operator_New__r.pro_KYC_Approved__c), "Yes", IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/tick.png", "Yes"), "No", IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/cross.png", "No"), "Not Applicable", "Not Applicable", "" ), CASE( TEXT(leaseworks__Aircraft__r.leaseworks__Asset_Owner_new__r.pro_KYC_Approved__c), "Yes", IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/tick.png", "Yes"), "No", IMAGE("/resource/1719316089000/GraphicsPackNew/fatcow/farmfresh/16/cross.png", "No"), "Not Applicable", "Not Applicable", "" ) )
CustomField.label: KYC Approved
